attributes.db.name: taskflow
attributes.db.statement:
SELECT users.id, users.email, users.hashed_password, users.display_name, users.created_at, users.is_active 
FROM users 
WHERE users.email = $1::VARCHAR /*db_driver='asyncpg',db_framework='sqlalchemy%%3A2.0.51',traceparent='00-082e7a011113cc02f16661d8b22034c5-6af8c22f25322948-03'*/
